title: Add Facebook page integration

requirements.text: Add a clickable Facebook link to the Footer social links section that opens https://www.facebook.com/share/1BrQ3UHjDK/ in a new tab

quotes: CONNECT THIS FACE BOOK ACCOUNT TO THE WEBSITE https://www.facebook.com/share/1BrQ3UHjDK/

acceptanceCriteria: Facebook icon appears in the Footer social links alongside existing social icons
Clicking the Facebook icon opens https://www.facebook.com/share/1BrQ3UHjDK/ in a new browser tab
The link uses appropriate accessible attributes (aria-label, rel="noopener noreferrer")
Visual style matches existing social link icons in the Footer

constraints: Maintain existing Footer component structure and styling
Use the same icon library and styling pattern as existing social links
